title: Career Opportunity Teacher at SSC Tube

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at SSC Tube
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
